name: TestGetWaitLinHdrData
title: TestGetWaitLinHdrData
description: If LIN Header event is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the header content can be called up with the first function.The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aHeader
parameters.description: Header variable that should be filled in with this function.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Number of the "joined event" corresponds with the return value of "testJoin...".

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
